channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SNOWMAN] Snowman Logistics: Board approves KMP changes, new Independent Directors
item.description:
Snowman Logistics Limited's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 20, 2026, approved several key managerial personnel changes. Mr. Raghav Chandra and Ms. Sriparna Ganguly Chaudhuri were appointed as Non-Executive Independent Directors for a five-year term, subject to shareholder approval. Concurrently, Mr. Arun Kumar Gupta and Mr. Bhaskar Avula Reddy ceased to be Non-Executive Independent Directors due to the completion of their second consecutive terms. Additionally, Mr. Sohan Singh Dhakad resigned from the position of Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective April 30, 2026, though he will continue in a different role within the company. Ms. Richa Gupta was appointed as the new Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective May 1, 2026. The Board also revised the authorization of Key Managerial Personnel under Regulation 30(5) for determining the materiality of events, now including Mr. Padamdeep Singh Handa (CEO), Mr. Raghav Garg (CFO), and Ms. Richa Gupta (CS & Compliance Officer). A postal ballot notice for the Independent Director appointments will be circulated to shareholders.

  • Two new Non-Executive Independent Directors appointed for 5-year terms.
  • Two existing Independent Directors ceased due to term completion.
  • Company Secretary & Compliance Officer resigned; new CS appointed.
  • Revised KMP authorization for determining event materiality.
  • Shareholder approval sought for new Independent Director appointments via postal ballot.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Snowman Logistics Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ADANIPOWER] Adani Power: Step-Down Wholly Owned Subsidiary Incorporated
item.description:
Adani Power Ltd has announced the incorporation of a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary, Rawatbhata-Raj Atomic Energy Limited (RRAEL), on April 20, 2026. RRAEL is a subsidiary of Adani Atomic Energy Limited (AAEL), which is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Adani Power. RRAEL will focus on generating, transmitting, and distributing power derived from nuclear and/or atomic energy. RRAEL has been incorporated with an authorized capital of ₹5,00,000.

  • Adani Power incorporates Rawatbhata-Raj Atomic Energy Limited (RRAEL) as a step-down subsidiary.
  • RRAEL will focus on power generation, transmission, and distribution from nuclear energy.
  • RRAEL's authorized capital is ₹5,00,000 divided into 50,000 equity shares of ₹10 each.
  • 100% of RRAEL's shareholding is held by Adani Atomic Energy Limited (AAEL).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI POWER LTD. | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [CENTRALBK] Central Bank of India Appoints New Chief Risk Officer
item.description:
Central Bank of India has announced the appointment of Shri Raj Kokil Singh as the new Chief Risk Officer (CRO) effective April 20, 2026. He will serve a fixed tenure of three years, replacing Dr. G. Bhaskar, who has been assigned the Treasury portfolio. Shri Singh, aged 44, brings over 19 years of banking experience, including roles in Risk Management, Credit, and Treasury. He holds an MBA and is certified as a Financial Risk Manager (FRM) and Sustainability & Climate Risk (SCR) professional.

  • Shri Raj Kokil Singh appointed as new Chief Risk Officer.
  • Appointment effective from April 20, 2026, for a 3-year tenure.
  • Dr. G. Bhaskar moves to the Treasury portfolio.
  • New CRO has over 19 years of banking and risk management experience.
  • CRO holds FRM and SCR certifications.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTRAL BANK OF INDIA | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MRCAGRO] MRC Agrotech: Not a Large Corporate for Debt Securities
item.description:
MRC Agrotech Ltd has confirmed that it does not meet the criteria to be classified as a 'Large Corporate' as of March 31, 2026, according to SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/CIR/P/2018/144. Consequently, the company is not required to make the initial disclosure for fundraising via debt securities as stipulated by the circular. This clarification is for informational purposes and records.

  • Company confirms it's not a 'Large Corporate' under SEBI rules.
  • No initial disclosure required for debt securities issuance.
  • Clarification pertains to SEBI circular dated November 26, 2018.
  • Applies to the company's status as of March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MRC Agrotech Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [JRFOODS] JR Foods Ltd Renamed DATACIPHER LIMITED, Scrip ID to DATA
item.description:
JR Foods Ltd has officially changed its name to DATACIPHER LIMITED, effective April 24, 2026. This change will be reflected on the BSE portal, and the new scrip ID for the BOLT Plus System will be 'DATA'. The company has provided a certificate of incorporation for the name change. This corporate action signifies a rebranding initiative by the company.

  • Company name changed from JR Foods Ltd to DATACIPHER LIMITED.
  • Effective date for name change is April 24, 2026.
  • New scrip ID on BSE BOLT Plus System will be 'DATA'.
  • This is a corporate action related to rebranding.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JR Foods Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar: High Court Grants Interim Stay on GST Demand Notice
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACME Solar Holdings Ltd has received an interim stay from the Hon'ble High Court of Rajasthan on the show cause cum demand notice issued by GST authorities. This stay, granted on April 20, 2026, suspends the operation and effect of the notice until further orders. This development follows previous intimations regarding the notice on March 29 and April 13, 2026. The company has provided details as per SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • High Court grants interim stay on GST show cause notice.
  • Stay is effective until further orders from the court.
  • Company previously intimated about the GST notice.
  • Details provided as per SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [JRELTD] Eraaya Lifespaces Corrects Previously Filed Financial Results
item.description:
Eraaya Lifespaces Ltd has filed a clarification regarding its previously submitted financial results for the period ended September 30, 2025. The company inadvertently omitted a note and made a clerical error in note numbering. The corrected standalone financial results, including the reinserted notes (8, 9, 10, and 11) and adjusted numbering, are being resubmitted for clarity. All other financial figures and disclosures remain unchanged. The filing also details a prior acquisition of Ebix Inc. where Vikas Lifecare Limited contributed significantly and later received 51% shares of Ebix International Holdings Limited due to a settlement.

  • Company resubmits financial results due to clerical oversight.
  • Note numbering and content have been corrected for clarity.
  • Previous filing had an inadvertently skipped note.
  • Acquisition of Ebix Inc. and subsequent share transfer to Vikas Lifecare detailed.
  • All other financial figures remain unchanged.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Justride Enterprises Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [RAILTEL] RailTel Secures ₹86.36 Cr Cloud Services Order from MCGM
item.description:
🔥 Trending

RailTel Corporation of India Ltd has received a Letter of Acceptance (LoA) from the Municipal Corporation of Greater Mumbai (MCGM) for provisioning, configuration, testing, commissioning, operations, and maintenance of cloud services. The estimated value of this domestic customer project is ₹86,36,21,334 (including tax). The contract is set to be executed by June 5, 2029. This significant order underscores RailTel's capabilities in providing comprehensive cloud solutions to government entities.

  • RailTel awarded ₹86.36 Cr cloud services contract by MCGM.
  • Project involves provisioning, testing, commissioning, and O&M of cloud services.
  • Contract duration extends until June 5, 2029.
  • Order is classified as a domestic customer project.
  • No promoter or related party interest involved in the contract.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ADANIENT] Adani Enterprises Board Meeting on April 30, 2026 for FY26 Results
item.description:
Adani Enterprises Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026. The primary agenda includes the approval of the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the board will consider recommending a dividend for FY 2025-26 and explore options for raising funds through equity or other securities. A post-results conference call for investors and analysts is scheduled for the same day.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026.
  • Approval of Audited Financial Results for Q4 FY26 and FY26.
  • Consideration of dividend recommendation for FY 2025-26.
  • Exploration of potential fund-raising through equity issuance.
  • Post-results investor conference call on April 30, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PPAP] PPAP Automotive: Director Resignation Confirmation Pending
item.description:
PPAP Automotive Ltd has provided an update regarding the resignation of Ms. Celine George. Following her resignation, the company requested confirmation of no other material reasons beyond those stated. As of the latest update, this confirmation has not been received from Ms. George despite follow-up reminders. The company states it has no further information regarding other material reasons for her resignation and will update the stock exchanges if the confirmation is received.

  • Director Ms. Celine George's resignation confirmation is pending.
  • Company requested confirmation of no other material resignation reasons.
  • Confirmation not received despite follow-up reminders.
  • Company has no further information on resignation reasons.
  • Further updates will be provided upon receipt of confirmation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PPAP Automotive Limited | Category: Management Change
